summary: Pre-existing test infra failure: pipeArguments TypeError in tool-graph.ts prevents all tests from running
detail: Running any test under packages/opencode fails with "Unhandled error between tests" at Pipeable.js:29. The error is in tool-graph.ts:207 which calls pipe() with an object argument instead of a function. This pre-existing infrastructure issue prevents verifying cache-pipeline.test.ts via bun test. The test code follows the same patterns as external-directory.test.ts and should be correct.
